/usr/bin/ar qc libmfl.a CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/mfl_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/font_library.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/accent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/big_op.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/fraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/gen_script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/left_right.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/math_char.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/noad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/overline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/radical.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/noad/underline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/glue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/hlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/vlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/node/vstack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/accent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/big_op.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/font_group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/fraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/function.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/left_right.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/math_char.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/math_space.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/parser_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/parser_utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/radical.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/script.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/tokens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/unicode_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/parser/utf8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mfl.dir/units.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmfl.a
